name: Aphid
description: A tiny defenseless insect that serves as one of the yard's earliest food sources. It does not fight; it survives by fleeing, squeaking, and occasionally leaving behind honeydew.
specialTraits: It can be tamed with Plant Slurry. Sleek Aphid Slippers stop it from fleeing, and the Speed Droplet only comes from stealing.
behavior: It wanders aimlessly through the grass and occasionally drops honeydew. When startled, it squeaks, hops, and often climbs grass or dry grass stalks to get away.
interactionWithPlayer: It flees from the player the moment it notices them. It can be tamed with Plant Slurry, after which it stops running away and may even steal that food from player containers.
interactionWithCreatures: Ladybugs actively hunt it and lawn mites also attack it at times. Around almost any creature it repeats the same flee response, even when that creature is not hostile to it.
strategy: The easiest way to kill it is to hit it before it sees you. If it climbs a stalk, knock the plant down to drop and stun it before finishing the job.

lootTransformations.description: If the creature is killed with spicy damage or a verified heat effect, compatible meat can become cooked meat.
If the creature is killed with salty damage, compatible meat can become jerky.
